info.title: olvid-full
info.description: Use Nextcloud as an Olvid directory.

get.summary: Returns the current user's Olvid profile fields and admin status

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

delete.summary: Unlinks the current user's Olvid identity from this directory When $revoke is true the identity is also permanently blocked for all contacts

parameters.name: revoke
parameters.description: Permanently revoke the identity (irreversible)

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

get.summary: Returns the avatar image for a group. Requires a valid photoUid query parameter The photoUid acts as a cache-buster; clients should update the URL when it changes

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Group ID (URL path)

parameters.name: photoUid
parameters.description: Base64-encoded photo UID (query parameter, used for cache validation)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

put.summary: Uploads or replaces the avatar image for a group
put.description:
PhpUnused
This endpoint requires admin access

photoData.description: Base64-encoded image data (PNG or JPEG, JSON body)

parameters.description: Group ID (URL path)

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

get.summary: Returns the caller's directory profile, API key, push topics, and pending revocations Used on identity creation (GET variant)

parameters.name: deviceUid
parameters.description: Optional device UID to register

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Millisecond timestamp; only revocations newer than this are returned

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.summary: Returns the caller's directory profile, API key, push topics, and pending revocations Used on subsequent syncs (POST variant)

timestamp.description: Millisecond timestamp; only revocations newer than this are returned

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.summary: Registers or replaces the caller's Olvid identity (base64-encoded) in the directory

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.summary: Retrieves the signed identity details of another directory user Note: the request body uses "user-id" which cannot be a PHP identifier; the handler reads it directly from php://input

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.summary: Searches the directory by display name or identity fields

filter.description: Search string; empty returns all users up to the server limit

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.summary: Returns all enrolled users, optionally filtered to those registered after a timestamp

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

post.summary: Returns signed group blobs, deletions, and kicks updated since the given timestamp

timestamp.description: Millisecond timestamp; null defaults to last 60 days

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass
